title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. electum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. electum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to stimulate digestion, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat various ailments.
